title: centaurium linariifolium subsp. barrelieri
intro: Centaurium linariifolium subsp. barrelieri, also known as Barrelier's centaury, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Centaurium linariifolium subsp. barrelieri is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some herbal supplements and remedies.
